name: Magic Hand
desc: When your opponent adds a card(s) from their Deck to their hand, except by drawing them (except during the Damage Step): You can send that card(s) to the GY, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field.
mnst_eff: When your opponent adds a card(s) from their Deck to their hand, except by drawing them (except during the Damage Step): You can send that card(s) to the GY, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field.
eff: When your opponent adds a card(s) from their Deck to their hand, except by drawing them (except during the Damage Step): You can send that card(s) to the GY, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Activates if your opponent adds a card to the hand
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
misc: Once while face-up on the field
